diagrams.title: Friend Function Declaration Syntax
diagrams.description: Shows how a friend function is declared inside a class and its relationship to the class
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the syntax and understand that friend function is external but has special access

diagrams.title: Friend Function vs Member Function Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing how member functions and friend functions differ in calling convention
elements: comparison table showing this pointer, inheritance, virtual, const
diagrams.purpose: Clear understanding of differences between member and friend functions

diagrams.title: Friend Class Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows mutual friendship between two classes and non-transitive nature
elements: explanation that B cannot access A's members unless declared
transitivity demonstration showing A->B and B->C does not mean A->C
